content:
# Karsting

**Summary**: A geological and geographical term for a landform shaped by the dissolution of soluble rocks.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2010-al-moqbel|Al-Moqbel, 2010]] identified karsting features that caused poor signal-to-noise ratios in seismic data.

## Scientific Context

- [[2010-al-moqbel|Al-Moqbel, 2010]] Karst features create complex velocity environments and poor seismic signal quality.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2010-al-moqbel|Al-Moqbel, 2010]] identified via comparison between standard semblance and integrated model results.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The model successfully identified karst features between CMPs 3816 and 4816, where standard picking was difficult. ([[2010-al-moqbel|Al-Moqbel, 2010, p. 17]])
